title: lithospermum tingens
intro: Lithospermum tingens, also known as the blue forget-me-not or gentian root, is a flowering plant species in the borage family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Lithospermum tingens include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and boost the immune system. Lithospermum tingens can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and capsules, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
